metadata.creator: Partha Ray
metadata.description:
This is collection of thirty eight 'Editorial's published in FMRAI News,( the Newsletter Of Federation of Medical and Sales Reresentatives' Associations Of India, a trade Union of the Field Workers) in the period between March 2019 and April, 2022(including March 2019 and April, 2022). It is Titled 'Reflection On Struggle: Chronicle'. It was published by CRU(NER),i.e., Centre of Medical and Sales Representatives' Union, North Eastern Region, on the occasion of Golden Jubilee Celebration( 50 years of establishment of CRU) of CRU at Guwahati  on 7th May, 2022.  
The Editor of FMRAI news for this period is Santanu Chattopadhya, in the capacity of  General Secretary of FMRAI.  The Editorial board of FMRAI news, during this period, consists of Ramesh Sundar, the President , Santanu Chattopadhya, the General Secretary and Partha Ray, Working Committee Member.
subject: FMRAI, Editorials, FMRAI News

It is Titled 'Reflection On Struggle: Chronicle'. It was published by CRU(NER),i.e., Centre of Medical and Sales Representatives' Union, North Eastern Region, on the occasion of Golden Jubilee Celebration( 50 years of establishment of CRU) of CRU at Guwahati  on 7th May, 2022.  
The Editor of FMRAI news for this period is Santanu Chattopadhya, in the capacity of  General Secretary of FMRAI.  The Editorial board of FMRAI news, during this period, consists of Ramesh Sundar, the President , Santanu Chattopadhya, the General Secretary and Partha Ray, Working Committee Member.
